verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc autem sunt verba David novissima. Dixit David filius Isai :   Dixit vir, cui constitutum est de christo Dei Jacob,  egregius psaltes Israël :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֛לֶּה דִּבְרֵ֥י דָוִ֖ד הָאַחֲרֹנִ֑ים נְאֻ֧ם דָּוִ֣ד בֶּן־יִשַׁ֗י וּנְאֻ֤ם הַגֶּ֙בֶר֙ הֻ֣קַם עָ֔ל מְשִׁ֙יחַ֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יַעֲקֹ֔ב וּנְעִ֖ים זְמִר֥וֹת יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now these are David's last words. David the son of Isai said: The man to whom it was appointed concerning the Christ of the God of Jacob, the excellent psalmist of Israel said:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja nämät ovat Davidin viimeiset sanat. David, Isain poika, sanoi, se mies sanoi, joka korotettu on, Jakobin Jumalan voideltu, ja suloinen Israelin psalmein veisaaja:
verses.king_james: Now these be the last words of David. David the son of Jesse said, and the man who was raised up on high, the anointed of the God of Jacob, and the sweet psalmist of Israel, said,

verses.latin_vulgate: Spiritus Domini locutus est per me,  et sermo ejus per linguam meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ר֥וּחַ יְהֹוָ֖ה דִּבֶּר־בִּ֑י וּמִלָּת֖וֹ עַל־לְשׁוֹנִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The spirit of the Lord hath spoken by me and his word by my tongue.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herran Henki on puhunut minun kauttani, ja hänen sanansa on tapahtunut minun kieleni kautta.
verses.king_james: The Spirit of the Lord spake by me, and his word was in my tongue.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit Deus Israël mihi,  locutus est fortis Israël :  Dominator hominum,  justus dominator in timore Dei,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָמַר֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל לִ֥י דִבֶּ֖ר צ֣וּר יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל מוֹשֵׁל֙ בָּאָדָ֔ם צַדִּ֕יק מוֹשֵׁ֖ל יִרְאַ֥ת אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: The God of Israel said to me, the strong one of Israel spoke, the ruler of men, the just ruler in the fear of God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Israelin Jumala on sanonut minulle, Israelin turva on minulle puhunut, ihmisten hallitsiasta, vanhurskaasta, joka hallitsee Jumalan pelvossa.
verses.king_james: The God of Israel said, the Rock of Israel spake to me, He that ruleth over men must be just, ruling in the fear of God.

verses.latin_vulgate: sicut lux auroræ, oriente sole,  mane absque nubibus rutilat :  et sicut pluviis germinat herba de terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּכְא֥וֹר בֹּ֖קֶר יִזְרַח־שָׁ֑מֶשׁ בֹּ֚קֶר לֹ֣א עָב֔וֹת מִנֹּ֥גַהּ מִמָּטָ֖ר דֶּ֥שֶׁא מֵאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: As the light of the morning, when the sun riseth, shineth in the morning without clouds, and as the grass springeth out of the earth by rain.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niinkuin valkeus on aamulla, kuin aurinko koittaa, varhain ilman pilvetä, ja paisteesta sateen jälkeen ruoho kasvaa maasta.
verses.king_james: And he shall be as the light of the morning, when the sun riseth, even a morning without clouds; as the tender grass springing out of the earth by clear shining after rain.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nec tanta est domus mea apud Deum,  ut pactum æternum iniret mecum,  firmum in omnibus atque munitum.  Cuncta enim salus mea, et omnis voluntas,  nec est quidquam ex ea quod non germinet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־לֹא־כֵ֥ן בֵּיתִ֖י עִם־אֵ֑ל כִּי֩ בְרִ֨ית עוֹלָ֜ם שָׂ֣ם לִ֗י עֲרוּכָ֤ה בַכֹּל֙ וּשְׁמֻרָ֔ה כִּי־כׇל־יִשְׁעִ֥י וְכׇל־חֵ֖פֶץ כִּי־לֹ֥א יַצְמִֽיחַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Neither is my house so great with God, that he should make with me an eternal covenant, firm in all things and assured. For he is all my salvation, and all my will: neither is there ought thereof that springeth not up.
verses.finnish_biblia: Eikö minun huoneeni ole niin Jumalan tykönä? Sillä hän on tehnyt ijankaikkisen liiton minun kanssani, kaikella muodolla lujan ja vahvan; sillä se on kaikki minun autuuteni ja haluni; eikö se ole kasvava?
verses.king_james: Although my house be not so with God; yet he hath made with me an everlasting covenant, ordered in all things, and sure: for this is all my salvation, and all my desire, although he make it not to grow.

verses.latin_vulgate: Prævaricatores autem quasi spinæ evellentur universi,  quæ non tolluntur manibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְלִיַּ֕עַל כְּק֥וֹץ מֻנָ֖ד כֻּלָּ֑הַם כִּי־לֹ֥א בְיָ֖ד יִקָּֽחוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But transgressors shall all of them be plucked up as thorns: which are not taken away with hands.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta ilkiät ihmiset kaikki hävitetään niinkuin orjantappurat, joihin ei taideta käsin ruveta.
verses.king_james: But the sons of Belial shall be all of them as thorns thrust away, because they cannot be taken with hands:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et si quis tangere voluerit eas,  armabitur ferro et ligno lanceato,  igneque succensæ comburentur usque ad nihilum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִישׁ֙ יִגַּ֣ע בָּהֶ֔ם יִמָּלֵ֥א בַרְזֶ֖ל וְעֵ֣ץ חֲנִ֑ית וּבָאֵ֕שׁ שָׂר֥וֹף יִשָּׂרְפ֖וּ בַּשָּֽׁבֶת׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And if a man will touch them, he must be armed with iron and with the staff of a lance: but they shall be set on fire and burnt to nothing.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta jos joku tahtoo tarttua niihin, hänellä pitää täydellisesti oleman rauta ja keihään varsi; ja ne pitää kokonansa poltettaman tulella heidän sioissansa.
verses.king_james: But the man that shall touch them must be fenced with iron and the staff of a spear; and they shall be utterly burned with fire in the same place.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc nomina fortium David. Sedens in cathedra sapientissimus princeps inter tres, ipse est quasi tenerrimus ligni vermiculus, qui octingentos interfecit impetu uno.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֛לֶּה שְׁמ֥וֹת הַגִּבֹּרִ֖ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר לְדָוִ֑ד יֹשֵׁ֨ב בַּשֶּׁ֜בֶת תַּחְכְּמֹנִ֣י ׀ רֹ֣אשׁ הַשָּׁלִשִׁ֗י ה֚וּא עֲדִינ֣וֹ (העצנו) [הָֽעֶצְנִ֔י] עַל־שְׁמֹנֶ֥ה מֵא֛וֹת חָלָ֖ל בְּפַ֥עַם (אחד) [אֶחָֽת]׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: These are the names of the valiant men of David: Jesbaham sitting in the chair was the wisest chief among the three, he was like the most tender little worm of the wood, who killed eight hundred men at one onset.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät ovat Davidin sankarien nimet: Josebbaselet Tahkemonilainen, ylimmäinen päämiehistä: hän oli se AdoniEtsniläinen, joka nousi kahdeksaasataa vastaan, jotka tapettiin yhdellä erällä.
verses.king_james: These be the names of the mighty men whom David had: The Tachmonite that sat in the seat, chief among the captains; the same was Adino the Eznite: he lift up his spear against eight hundred, whom he slew at one time.

verses.latin_vulgate: Post hunc, Eleazar filius patrui ejus Ahohites inter tres fortes, qui erant cum David quando exprobraverunt Philisthiim, et congregati sunt illuc in prælium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַחֲרָ֛ו אֶלְעָזָ֥ר בֶּן־[דֹּד֖וֹ] (דדי) בֶּן־אֲחֹחִ֑י בִּשְׁלֹשָׁ֨ה (גברים) [הַגִּבֹּרִ֜ים] עִם־דָּוִ֗ד בְּחָרְפָ֤ם בַּפְּלִשְׁתִּים֙ נֶאֶסְפוּ־שָׁ֣ם לַמִּלְחָמָ֔ה וַֽיַּעֲל֖וּ אִ֥ישׁ יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: After him was Eleazar the son of Dodo the Ahohite, one of the three valiant men that were with David when they defied the Philistines, and they were there gathered together to battle.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitälähin oli Eleatsar Dodon poika Ahohin pojan, niiden kolmen sankarien keskellä Davidin kanssa, kuin he pilkkasivat Philistealaisia, jotka olivat sinne kokoontuneet sotaan, ja Israelin miehet menivät ylös.
verses.king_james: And after him was Eleazar the son of Dodo the Ahohite, one of the three mighty men with David, when they defied the Philistines that were there gathered together to battle, and the men of Israel were gone away:

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque ascendissent viri Israël, ipse stetit et percussit Philisthæos donec deficeret manus ejus, et obrigesceret cum gladio : fecitque Dominus salutem magnam in die illa : et populus qui fugerat, reversus est ad cæsorum spolia detrahenda.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֣וּא קָם֩ וַיַּ֨ךְ בַּפְּלִשְׁתִּ֜ים עַ֣ד ׀ כִּֽי־יָגְעָ֣ה יָד֗וֹ וַתִּדְבַּ֤ק יָדוֹ֙ אֶל־הַחֶ֔רֶב וַיַּ֧עַשׂ יְהֹוָ֛ה תְּשׁוּעָ֥ה גְדוֹלָ֖ה בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֑וּא וְהָעָ֛ם יָשֻׁ֥בוּ אַחֲרָ֖יו אַךְ־לְפַשֵּֽׁט׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And when the men of Israel were gone away, he stood and smote the Philistines till his hand was weary, and grew stiff with the sword: and the Lord wrought a great victory that day: and the people that were fled away, returned to take spoils of them that were slain.
verses.finnish_biblia: Se nousi ja löi Philistealaiset, siihenasti että hänen kätensä väsyi ja puuntui miekasta. Ja Herra antoi suuren autuuden siihen aikaan, niin että kansa palasi hänen jälkeensä ainoasti ryöstämään.
verses.king_james: He arose, and smote the Philistines until his hand was weary, and his hand clave unto the sword: and the Lord wrought a great victory that day; and the people returned after him only to spoil.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et post hunc, Semma filius Age de Arari. Et congregati sunt Philisthiim in statione : erat quippe ibi ager lente plenus. Cumque fugisset populus a facie Philisthiim,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַחֲרָ֛יו שַׁמָּ֥ה בֶן־אָגֵ֖א הָרָרִ֑י וַיֵּאָסְפ֨וּ פְלִשְׁתִּ֜ים לַחַיָּ֗ה וַתְּהִי־שָׁ֞ם חֶלְקַ֤ת הַשָּׂדֶה֙ מְלֵאָ֣ה עֲדָשִׁ֔ים וְהָעָ֥ם נָ֖ס מִפְּנֵ֥י פְלִשְׁתִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And after him was Semma the son of Age of Arari. And the Philistines were gathered together in a troop: for there was a field full of lentils. And when the people were fled from the face of the Philistines,
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen jälkeensä oli Samma Agen Hararilaisen poika: koska Philistealaiset kokosivat itsensä yhteen kylään ja siellä oli yksi peltosarka täynnä herneitä, ja kansa pakeni Philistealaisia;
verses.king_james: And after him was Shammah the son of Agee the Hararite. And the Philistines were gathered together into a troop, where was a piece of ground full of lentiles: and the people fled from the Philistines.

verses.latin_vulgate: stetit ille in medio agri, et tuitus est eum, percussitque Philisthæos : et fecit Dominus salutem magnam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְיַצֵּ֤ב בְּתוֹךְ־הַחֶלְקָה֙ וַיַּצִּילֶ֔הָ וַיַּ֖ךְ אֶת־פְּלִשְׁתִּ֑ים וַיַּ֥עַשׂ יְהֹוָ֖ה תְּשׁוּעָ֥ה גְדוֹלָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: He stood in the midst of the field, and defended it, and defeated the Philistines: and the Lord gave a great victory.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin seisoi hän keskellä sarkaa ja varjeli sen, löi Philistealaiset, ja Herra antoi suuren autuuden.
verses.king_james: But he stood in the midst of the ground, and defended it, and slew the Philistines: and the Lord wrought a great victory.

verses.latin_vulgate: Necnon et ante descenderant tres qui erant principes inter triginta, et venerant tempore messis ad David in speluncam Odollam : castra autem Philisthinorum erant posita in Valle gigantum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּרְד֨וּ (שלשים) [שְׁלֹשָׁ֜ה] מֵהַשְּׁלֹשִׁ֣ים רֹ֗אשׁ וַיָּבֹ֤אוּ אֶל־קָצִיר֙ אֶל־דָּוִ֔ד אֶל־מְעָרַ֖ת עֲדֻלָּ֑ם וְחַיַּ֣ת פְּלִשְׁתִּ֔ים חֹנָ֖ה בְּעֵ֥מֶק רְפָאִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moreover also before this the three who were princes among the thirty, went down and came to David in the harvest time into the cave of Odollam: and the camp of the Philistines was in the valley of the giants.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja nämät kolme ylimmäistä kolmenkymmenen keskellä tulivat alas elonaikana Davidin tykö Adullamin luolaan; ja Philistealaisten leiri oli Rephaimin laaksossa.
verses.king_james: And three of the thirty chief went down, and came to David in the harvest time unto the cave of Adullam: and the troop of the Philistines pitched in the valley of Rephaim.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et David erat in præsidio : porro statio Philisthinorum tunc erat in Bethlehem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְדָוִ֖ד אָ֣ז בַּמְּצוּדָ֑ה וּמַצַּ֣ב פְּלִשְׁתִּ֔ים אָ֖ז בֵּ֥ית לָֽחֶם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David was then in a hold: and there was a garrison of the Philistines then in Bethlehem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta David oli siihen aikaan linnassa, ja Philistealaisten kansa oli Betlehemissä.
verses.king_james: And David was then in an hold, and the garrison of the Philistines was then in Beth–lehem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Desideravit ergo David, et ait : O si quis mihi daret potum aquæ de cisterna quæ est in Bethlehem juxta portam !
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְאַוֶּ֥ה דָוִ֖ד וַיֹּאמַ֑ר מִ֚י יַשְׁקֵ֣נִי מַ֔יִם מִבֹּ֥אר בֵּֽית־לֶ֖חֶם אֲשֶׁ֥ר בַּשָּֽׁעַר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And David longed, and said: O that some man would get me a drink of the water out of the cistern, that is in Bethlehem, by the gate.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David himoitsi ja sanoi: kuka tuo minulle juoda vettä Betlehemin kaivosta portin tyköä.
verses.king_james: And David longed, and said, Oh that one would give me drink of the water of the well of Beth–lehem, which is by the gate!

verses.latin_vulgate: Irruperunt ergo tres fortes castra Philisthinorum, et hauserunt aquam de cisterna Bethlehem, quæ erat juxta portam, et attulerunt ad David : at ille noluit bibere, sed libavit eam Domino,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּבְקְעוּ֩ שְׁלֹ֨שֶׁת הַגִּבֹּרִ֜ים בְּמַחֲנֵ֣ה פְלִשְׁתִּ֗ים וַיִּֽשְׁאֲבוּ־מַ֙יִם֙ מִבֹּ֤אר בֵּֽית־לֶ֙חֶם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בַּשַּׁ֔עַר וַיִּשְׂא֖וּ וַיָּבִ֣אוּ אֶל־דָּוִ֑ד וְלֹ֤א אָבָה֙ לִשְׁתּוֹתָ֔ם וַיַּסֵּ֥ךְ אֹתָ֖ם לַיהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the three valiant men broke through the camp of the Philistines, and drew water out of the cistern of Bethlehem, that was by the gate, and brought it to David: but he would not drink, but offered it to the Lord,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin ne kolme sankaria menivät Philistealaisten leiriin ja ammensivat vettä Betlehemin kaivosta, joka on portin tykönä, kantoivat ja toivat Davidille; mutta ei hän tahtonut sitä juoda, vaan kaasi Herran eteen,
verses.king_james: And the three mighty men brake through the host of the Philistines, and drew water out of the well of Beth–lehem, that was by the gate, and took it, and brought it to David: nevertheless he would not drink thereof, but poured it out unto the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: dicens : Propitius sit mihi Dominus, ne faciam hoc : num sanguinem hominum istorum qui profecti sunt, et animarum periculum bibam ? Noluit ergo bibere. Hæc fecerunt tres robustissimi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֡אמֶר חָלִ֩ילָה֩ לִּ֨י יְהֹוָ֜ה מֵעֲשֹׂ֣תִי זֹ֗את הֲדַ֤ם הָאֲנָשִׁים֙ הַהֹלְכִ֣ים בְּנַפְשׁוֹתָ֔ם וְלֹ֥א אָבָ֖ה לִשְׁתּוֹתָ֑ם אֵ֣לֶּה עָשׂ֔וּ שְׁלֹ֖שֶׁת הַגִּבֹּרִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Saying: The Lord be merciful to me, that I may not do this: shall I drink the blood of these men that went, and the peril of their lives? therefore he would not drink. These things did these three mighty men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi: Herra, olkoon se minusta kaukana, että minä se tekisin: eikö tämä ole niiden miesten veri, jotka itsensä antoivat hengenvaaraan ja sinne menivät? Ja ei tahtonut sitä juoda. Tämän tekivät ne kolme sankaria.
verses.king_james: And he said, Be it far from me, O Lord, that I should do this: is not this the blood of the men that went in jeopardy of their lives? therefore he would not drink it. These things did these three mighty men.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abisai quoque frater Joab filius Sarviæ, princeps erat de tribus : ipse est qui levavit hastam suam contra trecentos, quos interfecit : nominatus in tribus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲבִישַׁ֞י אֲחִ֣י ׀ יוֹאָ֣ב בֶּן־צְרוּיָ֗ה ה֚וּא רֹ֣אשׁ (השלשי) [הַשְּׁלֹשָׁ֔ה] וְהוּא֙ עוֹרֵ֣ר אֶת־חֲנִית֔וֹ עַל־שְׁלֹ֥שׁ מֵא֖וֹת חָלָ֑ל וְלוֹ־שֵׁ֖ם בַּשְּׁלֹשָֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Abisai also the brother of Joab, the son of Sarvia, was chief among three: and he lifted up his spear against three hundred whom he slew, and he was renowned among the three,
verses.finnish_biblia: Abisai Joabin veli ZeruJan poika oli myös ylimmäinen kolmen keskellä, hän nosti keihäänsä ja löi kolmesataa, ja oli myös ylistetty kolmen keskellä,
verses.king_james: And Abishai, the brother of Joab, the son of Zeruiah, was chief among three. And he lifted up his spear against three hundred, and slew them, and had the name among three.

verses.latin_vulgate: et inter tres nobilior, eratque eorum princeps, sed usque ad tres primos non pervenerat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִן־הַשְּׁלֹשָׁה֙ הֲכִ֣י נִכְבָּ֔ד וַיְהִ֥י לָהֶ֖ם לְשָׂ֑ר וְעַד־הַשְּׁלֹשָׁ֖ה לֹא־בָֽא׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the noblest of three, and was their chief, but to the three first he attained not.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaikkein jaloin kolmen keskellä ja oli heidän päämiehensä, mutta ei hän tullut niiden kolmen tykö.
verses.king_james: Was he not most honourable of three? therefore he was their captain: howbeit he attained not unto the first three.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et Banaias filius Jojadæ viri fortissimi, magnorum operum, de Cabseel. Ipse percussit duos leones Moab, et ipse descendit, et percussit leonem in media cisterna in diebus nivis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנָיָ֨הוּ בֶן־יְהוֹיָדָ֧ע בֶּן־אִֽישׁ־[חַ֛יִל] (חי) רַב־פְּעָלִ֖ים מִֽקַּבְצְאֵ֑ל ה֣וּא הִכָּ֗ה אֵ֣ת שְׁנֵ֤י אֲרִאֵל֙ מוֹאָ֔ב וְ֠ה֠וּא יָרַ֞ד וְהִכָּ֧ה אֶֽת־[הָאֲרִ֛י] (האריה) בְּת֥וֹךְ הַבֹּ֖אר בְּי֥וֹם הַשָּֽׁלֶג׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Banaias the son of Joiada a most valiant man, of great deeds, of Cabseel: he slew the two lions of Moab, and he went down, and slew a lion in the midst of a pit, in the time of snow.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Benaja Jojadan poika, kuuluisan miehen poika suurista töistänsä Kabselista löi kaksi Moabin väkevää niinkuin jalopeuraa, ja hän meni alas ja löi yhden jalopeuran kaivon tykönä lumen aikana.
verses.king_james: And Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, the son of a valiant man, of Kabzeel, who had done many acts, he slew two lionlike men of Moab: he went down also and slew a lion in the midst of a pit in time of snow:

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipse quoque interfecit virum ægyptium, virum dignum spectaculo, habentem in manu hastam : itaque cum descendisset ad eum in virga, vi extorsit hastam de manu Ægyptii, et interfecit eum hasta sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֽוּא־הִכָּה֩ אֶת־אִ֨ישׁ מִצְרִ֜י (אשר) [אִ֣ישׁ] מַרְאֶ֗ה וּבְיַ֤ד הַמִּצְרִי֙ חֲנִ֔ית וַיֵּ֥רֶד אֵלָ֖יו בַּשָּׁ֑בֶט וַיִּגְזֹ֤ל אֶֽת־הַחֲנִית֙ מִיַּ֣ד הַמִּצְרִ֔י וַיַּהַרְגֵ֖הוּ בַּחֲנִיתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He also slew an Egyptian, a man worthy to be a sight, having a spear in his hand: but he went down to him with a rod, and forced the spear out of the hand of the Egyptian, and slew him with his own spear.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän löi hirmuisen Egyptin miehen, jolla oli keihäs kädessä, mutta hän meni hänen tykönsä seipäällä, ja tempasi Egyptin miehen kädestä keihään, ja löi hänen kuoliaaksi omalla keihäällänsä.
verses.king_james: And he slew an Egyptian, a goodly man: and the Egyptian had a spear in his hand; but he went down to him with a staff, and plucked the spear out of the Egyptian’s hand, and slew him with his own spear.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc fecit Banaias filius Jojadæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֣לֶּה עָשָׂ֔ה בְּנָיָ֖הוּ בֶּן־יְהוֹיָדָ֑ע וְלוֹ־שֵׁ֖ם בִּשְׁלֹשָׁ֥ה הַגִּבֹּרִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: These things did Banaias the son of Joiada.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät teki Benaja Jojadan poika, ja oli ylistetty kolmen sankarin keskellä,
verses.king_james: These things did Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and had the name among three mighty men.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ipse nominatus inter tres robustos, qui erant inter triginta nobiliores : verumtamen usque ad tres non pervenerat : fecitque eum sibi David auricularium, a secreto.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִן־הַשְּׁלֹשִׁ֣ים נִכְבָּ֔ד וְאֶל־הַשְּׁלֹשָׁ֖ה לֹא־בָ֑א וַיְשִׂמֵ֥הוּ דָוִ֖ד אֶל־מִשְׁמַעְתּֽוֹ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And he was renowned among the three valiant men, who were the most honourable among the thirty: but he attained not to the first three: and David made him of his privy council.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja oli jalompi kuin ne kolmekymmentä mutta ei hän tullut niiden kolmen tykö; ja David asetti hänen salaiseksi neuvonantajaksensa.
verses.king_james: He was more honourable than the thirty, but he attained not to the first three. And David set him over his guard.

verses.latin_vulgate: Asaël frater Joab inter triginta, Elehanan filius patrui ejus de Bethlehem,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֲשָׂהאֵ֥ל אֲחִֽי־יוֹאָ֖ב בַּשְּׁלֹשִׁ֑ים אֶלְחָנָ֥ן בֶּן־דֹּד֖וֹ בֵּ֥ית לָֽחֶם׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Asael the brother of Joab was one of the thirty, Elehanan the son of Dodo of Bethlehem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Asahel, Joabin veli, kolmenkymmenen keskellä, Elhanan Dodonin poika Betlehemistä;
verses.king_james: Asahel the brother of Joab was one of the thirty; Elhanan the son of Dodo of Beth–lehem,

verses.latin_vulgate: Semma de Harodi, Elica de Harodi,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שַׁמָּה֙ הַחֲרֹדִ֔י {ס} אֱלִיקָ֖א הַחֲרֹדִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Semma of Harodi, Elica of Harodi,
verses.finnish_biblia: Samma Harodilainen, Elika Harodilainen;
verses.king_james: Shammah the Harodite, Elika the Harodite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Heles de Phalti, Hira filius Acces de Thecua,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֶ֚לֶץ הַפַּלְטִ֔י {ס} עִירָ֥א בֶן־עִקֵּ֖שׁ {ס} הַתְּקוֹעִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Heles of Phalti, Hira the son of Acces of Thecua,
verses.finnish_biblia: Helets Paltilainen, Ira Ikeksen Tekoalaisen poika;
verses.king_james: Helez the Paltite, Ira the son of Ikkesh the Tekoite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Abiezer de Anathoth, Mobonnai de Husati,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲבִיעֶ֙זֶר֙ הָעַנְּתֹתִ֔י {ס} מְבֻנַּ֖י הַחֻשָׁתִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Abiezer of Anathoth, Mobonnai of Husati,
verses.finnish_biblia: Abieser Anatotilainen, Mebunai Husatilainen;
verses.king_james: Abiezer the Anethothite, Mebunnai the Hushathite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Selmon Ahohites, Maharai Netophathites,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צַלְמוֹן֙ הָאֲחֹחִ֔י {ס} מַהְרַ֖י הַנְּטֹפָתִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Selmon the Ahohite, Maharai the Netophathite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Salmon Ahohilainen, Maharai Netophatilainen;
verses.king_james: Zalmon the Ahohite, Maharai the Netophathite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Heled filius Baana, et ipse Netophathites, Ithai filius Ribai de Gabaath filiorum Benjamin,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֵ֥לֶב בֶּֽן־בַּעֲנָ֖ה הַנְּטֹפָתִ֑י {ס} אִתַּי֙ בֶּן־רִיבַ֔י מִגִּבְעַ֖ת בְּנֵ֥י בִנְיָמִֽן׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Heled the son of Baana, also a Netophathite, Ithai the son of Ribai of Gabaath of the children of Benjamin,
verses.finnish_biblia: Heleb Baenan poika Netophatilainen, Ittai Ribain poika BenJaminin lasten Gibeasta;
verses.king_james: Heleb the son of Baanah, a Netophathite, Ittai the son of Ribai out of Gibeah of the children of Benjamin,

verses.latin_vulgate: Banaia Pharathonites, Heddai de torrente Gaas,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנָיָ֙הוּ֙ פִּרְעָ֣תֹנִ֔י {ס} הִדַּ֖י מִנַּ֥חֲלֵי גָֽעַשׁ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Banaia the Pharathonite, Heddai of the torrent Gaas,
verses.finnish_biblia: Benaja Pirtagonilainen, Hiddai Gasin ojista;
verses.king_james: Benaiah the Pirathonite, Hiddai of the brooks of Gaash,

verses.latin_vulgate: Abialbon Arbathites, Azmaveth de Beromi,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲבִֽי־עַלְבוֹן֙ הָעַרְבָתִ֔י {ס} עַזְמָ֖וֶת הַבַּרְחֻמִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Abialbon the Arbathite, Azmaveth of Beromi,
verses.finnish_biblia: Abialbon Arbatilainen, Asmavet Barhumilainen;
verses.king_james: Abi–albon the Arbathite, Azmaveth the Barhumite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Eliaba de Salaboni. Filii Jassen, Jonathan,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶלְיַחְבָּא֙ הַשַּׁ֣עַלְבֹנִ֔י {ס} בְּנֵ֥י יָשֵׁ֖ן יְהוֹנָתָֽן׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Eliaba of Salaboni. The sons of Jassen, Jonathan,
verses.finnish_biblia: Eliaheba Saalbonilainen Jasennin Jonathanin pojan;
verses.king_james: Eliahba the Shaalbonite, of the sons of Jashen, Jonathan,

verses.latin_vulgate: Semma de Orori, Ajam filius Sarar Arorites,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שַׁמָּה֙ הַהֲרָרִ֔י {ס} אֲחִיאָ֥ם בֶּן־שָׁרָ֖ר הָארָרִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Semma of Orori, Aliam the son of Sarar the Arorite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Samma Hararilainen, Ahiam Sararin poika Ararilainen;
verses.king_james: Shammah the Hararite, Ahiam the son of Sharar the Hararite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Eliphelet filius Aasbai filii Machati, Eliam filius Achitophel Gelonites,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱלִיפֶ֥לֶט בֶּן־אֲחַסְבַּ֖י בֶּן־הַמַּעֲכָתִ֑י {ס} אֱלִיעָ֥ם בֶּן־אֲחִיתֹ֖פֶל הַגִּלֹנִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Eliphelet the son of Aasbai the son of Machati, Eliam the son of Achitophel the Gelonite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Eliphelet Maakatin pojan Ahasbain poika, Eliam Ahitophelin Gilonilaisen poika;
verses.king_james: Eliphelet the son of Ahasbai, the son of the Maachathite, Eliam the son of Ahithophel the Gilonite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Hesrai de Carmelo, Pharai de Arbi,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: (חצרו) [חֶצְרַי֙] הַֽכַּרְמְלִ֔י {ס} פַּעֲרַ֖י הָאַרְבִּֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Hesrai of Carmel, Pharai of Arbi,
verses.finnish_biblia: Hesrai Karmelilainen, Paerai Arbilainen;
verses.king_james: Hezrai the Carmelite, Paarai the Arbite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Igaal filius Nathan de Soba, Bonni de Gadi,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִגְאָ֤ל בֶּן־נָתָן֙ מִצֹּבָ֔ה {ס} בָּנִ֖י הַגָּדִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Igaal the son of Nathan of Soba, Bonni of Gadi,
verses.finnish_biblia: Jigal Natanin poika Zobasta, Bani Gadilainen;
verses.king_james: Igal the son of Nathan of Zobah, Bani the Gadite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Selec de Ammoni, Naharai Berothites armiger Joab filii Sarviæ,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צֶ֖לֶק הָעַמֹּנִ֑י {ס} נַחְרַי֙ הַבְּאֵ֣רֹתִ֔י (נשאי) [נֹשֵׂ֕א] כְּלֵ֖י יוֹאָ֥ב בֶּן־צְרֻיָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Selec of Ammoni, Naharai the Berothite, armourbearer of Joab the son of Sarvia,
verses.finnish_biblia: Zelek Ammonilainen; Naharai Beerotilainen, Joabin ZeruJan pojan sota-asetten kantaja,
verses.king_james: Zelek the Ammonite, Naharai the Beerothite, armourbearer to Joab the son of Zeruiah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Ira Jethrites, Gareb et ipse Jethrites,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עִירָא֙ הַיִּתְרִ֔י {ס} גָּרֵ֖ב הַיִּתְרִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Ira the Jethrite, Gareb also a Jethrite;
verses.finnish_biblia: Ira Jitriläinen, Gareb Jitriläinen;
verses.king_james: Ira an Ithrite, Gareb an Ithrite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Urias Hethæus : omnes triginta septem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֽוּרִיָּה֙ הַחִתִּ֔י כֹּ֖ל שְׁלֹשִׁ֥ים וְשִׁבְעָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Urias the Hethite, thirty and seven in all.
verses.finnish_biblia: Uria Hetiläinen. Kaikki yhteen seitsemänneljättäkymmentä.
verses.king_james: Uriah the Hittite: thirty and seven in all.
